name: mosaic-token-extensions-admin
description: TypeScript SDK, CLI, and UI for managing standard token types on Solana (ex: Stablecoin & Arcade Tokens)

scripts.precommit: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix
scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run type-check

author: Solana Foundation

pnpm._dependencyNotes: These overrides pin the whole workspace onto the Solana Kit v6 ecosystem. Kit is capped at 6.x (not the newer 7.x) because the token-acl SDKs (@solana/token-acl-sdk, @solana/token-acl-gate-sdk) peer-depend on @solana/kit ^6.0.0. @solana-program/token-2022 is pinned to 0.10.0 (which already peers kit ^6): it still ships the confidential-transfer InstructionPlan/derive helpers the confidential feature needs, which were removed in 0.12.0. @solana/token-acl-sdk@0.4.0 hard-depends on token-2022 0.12.0 but is forced down to 0.10.0 here — safe because it only consumes stable core token-2022 exports unchanged across 0.10-0.12. Two packages still declare v5 kit ranges but are safe on v6 because they only touch codecs/signers/addresses (unchanged v5->v6): @solana-program/zk-elgamal-proof and @solana/connector are forced onto v6 via the @solana/kit override and the @solana/* transitive overrides. See packages/sdk/package.json `_dependencyNotes`.
